name: SingHaiyi Group Ltd.
summary: SingHaiyi Group Ltd., an investment holding company, develops, owns, and manages real estate properties in Singapore, Malaysia, Australia, and the United States. It operates through Property Development; and Property and Property Related Investment segments. The company develops and sells residential properties; owns and manages residential, commercial, retail, and other properties; and leases Tri-County Mall. It also provides property development advisory services. The company was formerly known as SingXpress Land Ltd. and changed its name to SingHaiyi Group Ltd. in March 2013. SingHaiyi Group Ltd. was incorporated in 1988 and is headquartered in Singapore. SingHaiyi Group Ltd. is a subsidiary of Haiyi Holdings Pte Ltd.
